metrics.label: Agents
metrics.description: Capability on agentic, multi-step tool-using tasks. Score is an LLM Stats TrueSkill rating (a conservative skill estimate from the benchmarks tagged with this category); higher is better.

metrics.label: Code
metrics.description: Capability on programming and code-generation tasks. Score is an LLM Stats TrueSkill rating (a conservative skill estimate from the benchmarks tagged with this category); higher is better.
